Veterans Benefits: North Carolina provides qualifying disabled veterans and surviving spouses a $45,000 homestead property-tax exclusion; DMVA also offers benefits/claims, education, health-care, and employment resources.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP NC policy score (6.25/49)
Description: Fayetteville is a military-centered Sandhills city next to Fort Liberty, with a local VA Medical Center, below-national cost of living, and trail and arts amenities including the Cape Fear River Trail. It has hot, humid summers and relatively mild winters; safety merits close, neighborhood-level review despite citywide crime declines.
